title: Conduct a site inspection for ecological restoration
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct a site inspection for ecological restoration demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect information

pcs.text: Obtain site location and details of proposed works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain site location and details of proposed works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain site location and details of proposed works.

pcs.text: Source and review available maps and plans for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and review available maps and plans for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and review available maps and plans for site.

pcs.text: Source and review available documents relevant to historical and current land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and review available documents relevant to historical and current land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and review available documents relevant to historical and current land use.

pcs.text: Identify scope of inspection according to stakeholder requirements and local regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify scope of inspection according to stakeholder requirements and local regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify scope of inspection according to stakeholder requirements and local regulations.

pcs.text: Determine biophysical, climate and weather conditions for site from historical data and climate change prediction tools
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine biophysical, climate and weather conditions for site from historical data and climate change prediction tools?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine biophysical, climate and weather conditions for site from historical data and climate change prediction tools.

pcs.text: Seek approval to visit site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek approval to visit site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek approval to visit site.

pcs.text: Identify and record covenants affecting the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record covenants affecting the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record covenants affecting the site.

pcs.text: Check availability of remote sensing tools relevant to the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check availability of remote sensing tools relevant to the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check availability of remote sensing tools relevant to the site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Collect information

elements.title: Prepare for a site visit

pcs.text: Identify and prepare resources required for site inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare resources required for site inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare resources required for site inspection.

pcs.text: Plan methods for recording inspection, and confirm record-keeping procedures according to industry requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan methods for recording inspection, and confirm record-keeping procedures according to industry requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan methods for recording inspection, and confirm record-keeping procedures according to industry requirements.

pcs.text: Evaluate scope of proposed works and prepare field notes to checklist specific concerns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate scope of proposed works and prepare field notes to checklist specific concerns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate scope of proposed works and prepare field notes to checklist specific concerns.

pcs.text: Evaluate environmental factors to determine likely site conditions and risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate environmental factors to determine likely site conditions and risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate environmental factors to determine likely site conditions and risks.

pcs.text: Consider access and traffic management requirements for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider access and traffic management requirements for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider access and traffic management requirements for site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for a site visit

elements.title: Visit site and confirm site parameters

pcs.text: Carry out site orientation and verify ownership and site boundaries according to maps and plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out site orientation and verify ownership and site boundaries according to maps and plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out site orientation and verify ownership and site boundaries according to maps and plans.

pcs.text: Identify site hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for site inspection according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for site inspection according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for site inspection according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify, estimate and record site dimensions, gradients and ecological features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, estimate and record site dimensions, gradients and ecological features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, estimate and record site dimensions, gradients and ecological features.

pcs.text: Identify and record existing on-site services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record existing on-site services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record existing on-site services.

pcs.text: Identify and record impact of features and characteristics of properties adjacent to site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record impact of features and characteristics of properties adjacent to site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record impact of features and characteristics of properties adjacent to site.

pcs.text: Identify substrate types from reference charts and texts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify substrate types from reference charts and texts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify substrate types from reference charts and texts.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Visit site and confirm site parameters

elements.title: Inspect site for biotic and abiotic elements

pcs.text: Collect substrate samples, conduct and record field tests according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect substrate samples, conduct and record field tests according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect substrate samples, conduct and record field tests according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify hydrological elements affecting site ecology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hydrological elements affecting site ecology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hydrological elements affecting site ecology.

pcs.text: Identify the specific ecological communities on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the specific ecological communities on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the specific ecological communities on site.

pcs.text: Identify ecosystem functions and processes occurring on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify ecosystem functions and processes occurring on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify ecosystem functions and processes occurring on site.

pcs.text: Determine condition and recovery potential of natural areas within the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine condition and recovery potential of natural areas within the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine condition and recovery potential of natural areas within the site.

pcs.text: Identify threatening processes affecting site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify threatening processes affecting site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify threatening processes affecting site conditions.

pcs.text: Investigate and record signs of fauna on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record signs of fauna on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record signs of fauna on site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Inspect site for biotic and abiotic elements

elements.title: Document information

pcs.text: Assess site information and determine reference ecosystem relevant to site restoration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site information and determine reference ecosystem relevant to site restoration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site information and determine reference ecosystem relevant to site restoration.

pcs.text: Prepare a base plan of site, including zones of varying condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a base plan of site, including zones of varying condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a base plan of site, including zones of varying condition.

pcs.text: Document site inspection according to stakeholder requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document site inspection according to stakeholder requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document site inspection according to stakeholder requirements and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete documents and submit to stakeholder or supervisor according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete documents and submit to stakeholder or supervisor according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete documents and submit to stakeholder or supervisor according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Document information
